query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A close-up of red flowers with broad green leaves against a bright, pale background. Crimson, pink, and coral petals cluster toward the upper center of the vertical frame, while teal and green foliage spreads beneath and around the blooms. The plant material fills the mid and upper portions of the composition, with pale tones appearing in the lower and surrounding areas.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred close-up of red flowers and green leaves against a bright pale background. Deliberate camera movement during exposure smears crimson petals and teal foliage into streaked, overlapping forms that drift across the vertical frame. Fine surface textures are largely absent, leaving the botanical structures dissolved into ambiguous shapes and mushy color fields. Chromatic aberration produces visible color fringing along the edges of the forms, adding an optical imperfection that underscores the image's dreamlike, ethereal quality.
